name: Portland Indoor Golf Club
about: Portland Indoor Golf Club (PIGC) is a state-of-the-art, 20,000+ sq. ft. training facility designed for serious game improvement rather than casual entertainment. Open 24/7, the venue functions as a private gym for golfers, providing unlimited access to 12 TrackMan simulator bays, a comprehensive short game area with a real sand bunker, and a 70-foot putting green. The facility is climate-controlled and equipped with advanced fitness technology, including Tonal machines and The Stack System, to help golfers build strength and speed. The environment focuses on data-driven practice, where members can refine their swings using radar technology and video analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for flexible training schedules around work and family
TrackMan simulators provide precise data and shot tracking
On-site gym with Tonal and Stack systems integrates fitness with golf practice
Short game area includes a real sand bunker and large putting green
Expert coaching available from Golf Digest's Best Young Instructors
Community atmosphere with monthly leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service; facility is training-focused
No food service mentioned; focus is on training and fitness

simulator_hardware.notes: 7 bays equipped with TrackMan 4e radar units

amenities_list: 24/7 Access|Climate Controlled|Fitness Center (Tonal)|Short Game Area|Putting Green|Real Sand Bunker|Gym/Warmup Area|Training Aids (GolfBoks, Mirror, etc.)|WiFi|Remote Workspaces

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated as rentals, most training studios require you to bring your own set, though they are equipped for right and left-handed golfers.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as a training facility with 24/7 access and lounge areas, members can typically bring their own refreshments.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Using the simulators, you can play a full 18-hole round in under an hour.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers specific junior programs, coaching for juniors, and a safe environment for youth training.
